name: com.viture.xr
description: Unity XR plugin for VITURE devices.

samples.description: Pre-configured XR Origin prefab and input actions for VITURE hand tracking. Sets up basic hand interaction with XR Interaction Toolkit. Dependencies: • Shader Graph
Editor-only HMD and hand interaction simulator. Provides a pre-configured prefab for testing hand tracking in Play mode without a device. Dependencies: • Starter Assets sample
Demonstrates how to track multiple markers and visualize them with 3D objects. Dependencies: • Starter Assets sample

Demonstrates RGB Camera API: display live camera feed, capture frames, and change resolution. Requires VITURE Luma Pro, Luma Ultra, or Beast glasses with built-in RGB camera. Dependencies: • Starter Assets sample
